city_report.transport: Metro + Bus line 200E Bus line 200E runs between Terminal 2 and Kőbánya-Kispest Metro station, taking 25 min, bus fare Ft500. You there buy a Metro ticket for another Ft500 and ride line 3 to the city centre, about 20 mins to the main interchange at Deák Ferenc tér. The bus runs all day every day, with 7-8 minutes frequency during the day, 30-60 minutes at late night.

attraction.name: Hungarian Parliament
attraction.description: Magnificent neo-Gothic building on the Danube bank.

attraction.name: Buda Castle
attraction.description: Historical palace complex of the Hungarian kings.

attraction.name: Fisherman's Bastion
attraction.description: Neo-Romanesque terrace with panoramic views of Pest.

attraction.name: Chain Bridge
attraction.description: The first permanent bridge connecting Buda and Pest.

attraction.name: Heroes' Square
attraction.description: Major square featuring the Millennium Monument.

attraction.name: St. Stephen's Basilica
attraction.description: Roman Catholic basilica named after the first King of Hungary.

attraction.name: Széchenyi Thermal Bath
attraction.description: Largest medicinal bath in Europe with outdoor pools.

attraction.name: Margaret Island
attraction.description: Quiet island park in the middle of the Danube.

attraction.name: Matthias Church
attraction.description: Roman Catholic church in the heart of Buda's Castle District.

attraction.name: Great Market Hall
attraction.description: Large indoor market offering local food and crafts.

city_report.description: Con un'architettura maestosa e una rete termale storica, Budapest si conferma una delle capitali più accessibili e scenografiche. Le recenti riforme urbane mirano a potenziare il trasporto pubblico e la sicurezza dei quartieri centrali.
city_report.wiki_intro: Budapest is the capital city of Hungary. With a unique, youthful atmosphere, world-class classical music scene, a pulsating nightlife increasingly appreciated among European youth, and last but not least, an exceptional offer of natural thermal baths, Budapest is one of Europe's most delightful and enjoyable cities. Due to the exceedingly scenic setting, and its architecture it is nicknamed...
